user.title: Connect to your iGuardStove account
user.description: Enter your iGuardFire account credentials. All stoves on the account will be discovered automatically.

data_description.username: The email address used to sign in to the iGuardFire management portal.
data_description.password: The password for the iGuardFire account.
The updated password for the configured iGuardFire account.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure iGuardStove account
reconfigure.description: Update the password for {username}. Account identity cannot be changed; remove and re-add the integration to switch accounts.

data_description.password: The password for the configured iGuardFire account.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to iGuardFire. Check your network connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your username and password.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This iGuardStove account is already configured.
abort.wrong_account: The account identity does not match this configuration entry.

data.allow_remote_unlock: Allow remote disengagement of stove lockout (Remote Unlock)

data_description.allow_remote_unlock: Enabling remote unlock allows disengaging physical stove lockouts from Home Assistant controls, automations, and scripts.
data_description.scan_interval: How often (in seconds) to poll the iGuardStove portal for status updates (30-300 seconds).
data_description.enable_activity_events: When enabled, fire Home Assistant event entities for newly observed activity log entries.
data_description.rediscover_devices: Immediately perform a one-shot device discovery pass to find newly added or reconfigured stoves.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to iGuardFire. Check your network connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your username and password.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

authentication_failed.message: Authentication failed when executing stove lock command.

lock_command_failed.message: Failed to connect to iGuardFire to execute stove lock command.

remote_unlock_disabled.message: Remote unlock is disabled in integration options. Enable it in the integration options before attempting to unlock.
